programs.title: My Cat From Hell
programs.desc: Reality star Adrianne Curry and her boyfriend, Todd are living with Adrianne's menacing Siamese cat, Billy Shears; a college student feels like she is being held prisoner by her bloodthirsty feline, Storm.

programs.title: My Cat From Hell
programs.desc: A cat-obsessed woman gets a kitten as a gift, but is quickly disappointed when the cat terrorizes her other two felines; a couple living in harmony is disturbed by their newest addition's demonic ways.

programs.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programs.desc: Tia and her rescue team land in a dangerous situation when an anonymous tip leads them toward a dog-fighting ring; one lucky pit bull awaits permission to enter a new home.

programs.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programs.desc: Mariah is devastated when she learns that a friend has passed away; several dogs are dumped at Villalobos, pushing kennels to the limit; a couple from Tia's past and their father-in-law adopt four dogs, necessitating a trip back to California.

programs.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins
programs.desc: Robert wrangles western diamondback rattlesnakes in Arizona for the first time, learning techniques passed down by his dad; Terri helps save some of the hospital's tiniest patients, three baby feathertail gliders; Bindi chats with Occa the cockatoo.

programs.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins
programs.desc: Robert feeds 44 hungry alligators, all at the same time; Terri helps examine Kaitlyn the tiger and makes a thrilling discovery; Bindi follows the heartbreaking story of her old friend, Zambezi the zebra.
